article1.content: The most powerful tool for communicating with LLMs (Large Language Models), the core of modern AI technology, is the 'prompt'. Beyond simple questions, prompts serve as a compass that guides the thinking process of AI, stimulates creativity, and leads to optimal results. A well-designed prompt can replace hundreds of lines of code or provide powerful efficiency that solves complex business processes in just seconds.

article2.header: 🚀 Essential Skill in the AI Era
article2.content: As high-performance AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini evolve, how you 'ask' and 'instruct' has become a core competitive advantage, going beyond simply using tools. The essence of prompt engineering lies in clearly setting the context, assigning specific personas, and elaborately handling constraints on output formats.

article3.content: PromptGenie provides a high-quality prompt library verified by elite prompt engineers worldwide. Explore optimized prompts in various categories such as business analysis, creative writing, and professional coding. Our library will be your strongest partner in helping you utilize AI's potential 100%.

steps.question: What is the AI's main role?
steps.placeholder: e.g. Senior Software Engineer, Creative Writer, Business Consultant

steps.question: What tone or style do you prefer?

{context}

items.question: What is PromptGenie?
items.answer: PromptGenie is a prompt engineering platform that helps you get the best performance from AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. It provides a verified prompt library and tools to create and optimize your own prompts.

items.question: Why is prompt engineering important?
items.answer: Even with the same AI model, the quality of the answer depends entirely on the quality of the prompt. Through prompt engineering, you can reduce AI hallucinations and get more accurate, creative results that better match your intentions.

items.question: Is this service free?
items.answer: Yes, the basic prompt library browsing and generation features of PromptGenie are currently free. We aim to help everyone easily utilize AI technology. Premium plans with advanced analytics may be introduced in the future.

items.question: Can I share my own prompts?
items.answer: Absolutely! PromptGenie is oriented toward community-driven growth. You can share your unique prompts through the 'Contributors' page and refine them further through feedback from other users.

Submit.title: Submit a Prompt
Submit.subtitle: Share your unique prompt and become a contributor to PromptGenie.
Submit.purposeDesc: The problem the prompt solves must be clearly defined.
Submit.instructionsDesc: Use structures and language that AI can easily understand.
Submit.verifiedDesc: Only submit prompts you have actually tested and gotten good results from.
Submit.step1Desc: Submit your prompt via Google Form.
Submit.step2Desc: Our team reviews and tests the content. (1-2 days)
Submit.step3Desc: Added to the library and credited as a contributor.
Submit.readyText: Ready? Click the button below to fill out the form.
Submit.note: * Submitted prompts will be added to the library after review, and you will be credited as a contributor.
